title: St Mary’s Prittlewell CofE Primary School: 14 November 2025
body: "Decision reference: VAR2612 and VAR2613  Type of decision: variation to admission arrangements for September 2025 and September 2026 – both approved  School type: voluntary-aided  School phase: primary  Local authority: Southend-on-Sea City Council  Admission authority: governing body  "
